# full-filters

Resource exclusions/inclusions/compareoptions/respectRBAC/labels/mask/events from operator-manual

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/resource/full-filters` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  resource.exclusions: |
    - apiGroups:
        - repositories.stash.appscode.com
      kinds:
        - Snapshot
      clusters:
        - "*.local"
  resource.inclusions: |
    - apiGroups:
        - apps
      kinds:
        - Deployment
      clusters:
        - "*"
  resource.compareoptions: |
    ignoreAggregatedRoles: true
    ignoreResourceStatusField: all
    ignoreDifferencesOnResourceUpdates: true
  resource.respectRBAC: "normal"
  resource.ignoreResourceUpdatesEnabled: "true"
  resource.customLabels: tier,app.kubernetes.io/name
  resource.sensitive.mask.annotations: openshift.io/token-secret.value,api-key
  resource.includeEventLabelKeys: team,env*
  resource.excludeEventLabelKeys: environment,bu
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  controller:
    diff:
      compareOptions:
        ignoreAggregatedRoles: true
        ignoreDifferencesOnResourceUpdates: true
        ignoreResourceStatusField: all
      ignoreResourceUpdatesEnabled: true
    resource:
      customLabelKeys:
      - tier
      - app.kubernetes.io/name
      eventLabels:
        excludeKeyGlobs:
        - environment
        - bu
        includeKeyGlobs:
        - team
        - env*
      exclusions:
      - apiGroups:
        - repositories.stash.appscode.com
        clusters:
        - '*.local'
        kinds:
        - Snapshot
      inclusions:
      - apiGroups:
        - apps
        clusters:
        - '*'
        kinds:
        - Deployment
      respectRBAC: normal
      sensitiveMaskAnnotationKeys:
      - openshift.io/token-secret.value
      - api-key
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  resource.compareoptions: |
    ignoreAggregatedRoles: true
    ignoreDifferencesOnResourceUpdates: true
    ignoreResourceStatusField: all
  resource.customLabels: tier,app.kubernetes.io/name
  resource.excludeEventLabelKeys: environment,bu
  resource.exclusions: |
    - apiGroups:
      - repositories.stash.appscode.com
      clusters:
      - '*.local'
      kinds:
      - Snapshot
  resource.ignoreResourceUpdatesEnabled: "true"
  resource.includeEventLabelKeys: team,env*
  resource.inclusions: |
    - apiGroups:
      - apps
      clusters:
      - '*'
      kinds:
      - Deployment
  resource.respectRBAC: normal
  resource.sensitive.mask.annotations: openshift.io/token-secret.value,api-key
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

## Diagnostics

### `diagnostics.yaml`

```yaml
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
- direction: cr->cm
  key: argocd-rbac-cm
  message: no source ConfigMap provided; labels/annotations cannot be preserved
  severity: warn
```
